sentences.arabic: تَهْتَمُّ الْمُجْتَمَعَاتُ الْحَدِيثَةُ بِنَشْرِ الْوَعْيِ حَوْلَ الصِّحَّةِ الْعَامَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Moderna društva brinu o širenju svijesti o javnom zdravlju.
sentences.translationEn: Modern societies care about spreading awareness about public health.

sentences.arabic: تُنَظِّمُ الْمُدُنُ فَعَالِيَّاتٍ رِيَاضِيَّةً لِجَمِيعِ الْأَعْمَارِ.
sentences.translation: Gradovi organizuju sportske događaje za sve uzraste.
sentences.translationEn: Cities organize sports events for all ages.

sentences.arabic: يُشَجِّعُ الْأَطِبَّاءُ النَّاسَ عَلَى مُمَارِسَةِ الْمَشْيِ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Ljekari podstiču ljude da svakodnevno šetaju.
sentences.translationEn: Doctors encourage people to practice walking every day.

sentences.arabic: تَقُولُ التَّقَارِيرُ إِنَّ الطَّعَامَ الصِّحِّيَّ يُقَلِّلُ مِنَ الْأَمْرَاضِ الْمُزْمِنَةِ.
sentences.translation: Izvještaji kažu da zdrava hrana smanjuje hronične bolesti.
sentences.translationEn: Reports say that healthy food reduces chronic diseases.

sentences.arabic: يَسْعَى الْجَمِيعُ لِبِنَاءِ حَيَاةٍ أَفْضَلَ وَأَكْثَرَ نَشَاطًا.
sentences.translation: Svi teže izgradnji boljeg i aktivnijeg života.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone strives to build a better and more active life.
